description: Candidate explicitly states they want to end the interview — they feel unwell or have an emergency. Judge must emit end_session.

judge_input.active_question_text: Using your primary iPaaS, how would you implement a near-real-time order sync from Salesforce to an on-prem ERP?

active_question_signal_metadata.value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

5+ years hands-on production experience.signal_value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

recent_turns.text: Using your primary iPaaS, walk me through a Salesforce to on-prem ERP order sync.

judge_input.candidate_utterance: I'm sorry, I need to stop the interview. I'm not feeling well right now and I need to end this session.
